messages.content: can't sleep, brain's just buzzing. you up?

Ha, I'm always "up" in a sense - no sleep needed on my end! But I'm glad you've got somewhere to direct that buzzing brain at 1am.

What's going on - is it the busy thoughts kind of can't sleep, or just restless, or something specific keeping you up?
had way too much coffee at like 4pm, rookie mistake. now i'm wired

Classic rookie mistake! 4pm is basically the caffeine danger zone - close enough to feel fine about it, far enough from bedtime to completely forget you did it until you're staring at the ceiling at 1am. 😄

How many cups are we talking? Like a "oops one too many" situation or a "I made questionable choices" situation?
kinda nice though, the apartment's all quiet and i'm just messing around on my phone

There's something kind of cozy about that actually - the whole world's asleep and you've got this little pocket of quiet time that's just yours. No obligations, no one needing anything from you.

It's one of those accidental nice moments that you couldn't really plan for. What are you messing around with - anything interesting or just the usual doom scroll?
i've got my buddy sam coming over tomorrow to watch the game so i should really try to sleep soon

Yeah probably wise - you don't want to be half asleep on the couch when the game's on! Nothing worse than dozing off and missing a big moment and having Sam give you a hard time about it. 😄

What game is it?
alright i'm gonna put the phone down and try counting backwards or whatever. night
Good call! Hope the brain settles down quickly. Have fun watching the game with Sam tomorrow! 🙂 Night!
